# Oura MCP
Unofficial local-first Oura MCP server for AI sleep, readiness, HRV and recovery agents.
Repository: https://github.com/davidmosiah/ouramcp
Homepage: https://wellness.delx.ai/connectors/oura
NPM: https://www.npmjs.com/package/oura-mcp-unofficial
Primary command: npm exec --yes --package=oura-mcp-unofficial -- oura-mcp-server doctor
MCP command: oura-mcp-server

- MCP registry name: io.github.davidmosiah/ouramcp
- Start agents with oura_connection_status and oura_data_inventory before any data tool.
- Read-only default tools: oura_agent_manifest, oura_capabilities, oura_privacy_audit, oura_connection_status, oura_data_inventory, oura_daily_summary, oura_weekly_summary, oura_cache_status.
- OAuth env: OURA_CLIENT_ID, OURA_CLIENT_SECRET, OURA_REDIRECT_URI.
- Optional env: OURA_TOKEN_PATH (token storage path), OURA_PRIVACY_MODE (summary|structured|raw, default structured), OURA_CACHE (true|sqlite to enable), OURA_CACHE_PATH.
- Prefer JSON responses for automation and markdown responses for human summaries.
- Tokens stay local under ~/.ouramcp/tokens.json (or equivalent) and should never be printed.
- Not medical advice. Use as trend context only — outputs are operational context, not medical, legal or financial advice.
